productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Rafa Bull Log Black Caps
description: CompositionBlack featherlight tennis cap made of 100% polyester,  nike Swoosh embroidered on visor, Bull logo embroidered on crown, Velcro fastener at the back, recycled content used in manufacturing, and engineered with Dri-Fit technologyFittingComfortWash careHand wash in warm water at 40 degreesDo not wring, bleach, iron or dry cleanLine dryTime to cheer for your favourite tennis player, Rafael Nadal in this black featherlight tennis cap from nike. Pledge your allegiance to this talented Spanish tennis player as you wear it to cheer during his matches, or when you're serving an ace yourself! All you environmentalists will be glad to know that this cap is made with recycled content. Engineered with Nike's Dri Fit technology, it wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable. This smart cap is super light, so you barely know that it's on your head, protecting you from the sun or jazzing up your outfit! Team it with your casual clothes for a sporty look.
